caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with bold text. The setting appears to be a studio or a room dedicated to recording, as evidenced by the microphone setup and the soundproofing elements visible in the background.
